svg.title: System architecture diagram
svg.desc: Three-tier React / Express / PostgreSQL spine connected to six external APIs, a Node-cron scheduler, a scheduled sync flow path, and a pending QR Partner Dashboard.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the React frontend')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Express backend')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about PostgreSQL in this stack')
sendPrompt('How does Node-cron trigger scheduled jobs?')
sendPrompt('How does the Shopify integration work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Zoho Inventory integration work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Zoho Books integration work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Zoho CRM integration work?')
sendPrompt('How does the AfterShip integration work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Klaviyo integration work?')
sendPrompt('How does Node-cron schedule the sync job?')
sendPrompt('How does the job fetch data from Zoho Inventory?')
sendPrompt('How are stock alert thresholds configured?')
sendPrompt('How are stock alerts written to the database?')
sendPrompt('How does the frontend surface stock alerts?')
sendPrompt('What will the QR Partner Dashboard do?')
